# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to SVP Kernel.

Please ensure your contribution aligns with the project's principles:

- Deterministic behavior
- Security-first engineering
- Reproducible changes
- Transparent decision-making
- Minimal unnecessary complexity

---

## Description

Describe the changes introduced by this pull request.

Include:

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?
- How does it improve SVP Kernel?

---

## Related Issue

Link the related issue:

Closes #

---

## Type of Change

Select the applicable category:

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Security improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Research contribution
- [ ] Refactoring

---

## Technical Details

Explain the implementation approach.

Include:

- Architecture changes
- Design decisions
- Tradeoffs considered

---

## Testing Performed

Describe validation performed.

Include:

- Tests executed
- Expected behavior
- Results

---

## Security Considerations

Does this change affect:

- Runtime decisions?
- Policy enforcement?
- Agent execution paths?
- Access control?
- Data handling?

If yes, explain the impact.

---

## Documentation Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Examples updated if required
- [ ] Comments added where logic is complex

---

## Contributor Checklist

Before submitting:

- [ ] I have reviewed my changes
- [ ] My changes follow project standards
- [ ] I have tested the changes
- [ ] I have considered security implications
- [ ] I have avoided unnecessary dependencies

---

## Additional Notes

Anything else reviewers should know?
